name: Creole Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 300 grams Mango flesh, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and cook the onion gently until it is transparent.
2. Add the minced meat and cook until it changes color, breaking up lumps with a fork.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Soak the bread in milk, squeeze out any excess, and break it up.
5. Mix the bread mixture with the onion-meat mixture.
6. Add the herbs, eggs, olives, mango flesh, seasonings, and remaining eggs. Blend well.
